docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-02-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GERUGHTY, TOM

DISMISSED. NO FURTHER ACTION TAKEN BY THE COURT. SFSD PROOF OF SERVICE FILED APRI 21, 2009 INDICATES: UNABLE TO DELIVER DOCUMENTS. DEFENDANT IS DECEASED. PLAINTIFF REFERRED TO THE ACCESS CENTER TO SEE WHAT, IF ANY FURTHER STEPS MAY BE TAKEN, RE: FILING CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT'S ESTATE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: BARBARA ANSCHER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
